name: Charls English Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the milk, shortening, salt, and sugar. Cool to lukewarm by adding water.
2. Dissolve the yeast as directed on the package and add it to the milk mixture, stirring well.
3. Gradually add the flour and mix until a soft dough is formed. Roll out the dough on a floured board to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
4. Cut the dough into rounds using a 3 1/2-inch round cutter. Place the muffins on a baking sheet sprinkled with 2 tablespoons of cornmeal, and sprinkle the tops with additional 2 tablespoons of cornmeal.
5. Let the batter rise in a warm place (85-90 degrees Fahrenheit) until doubled in size, about 1 hour.
6. Bake slowly on a hot, ungreased griddle until browned, about 7 minutes on each side.
7. Split the muffins and serve with butter and marmalade.
